name: Baharat (Saudi Mixed Spices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 1/3 cup of black pepper.
2. Measure out 1/4 cup of coriander powder.
3. Measure out 1/4 cup of cinnamon.
4. Measure out 1/4 cup of ground cloves.
5. Measure out 1/3 cup of cumin.
6. Measure out 2 teaspoons of ground cardamom.
7. Measure out 1/4 cup of ground nutmeg.
8. Measure out 1/2 cup of ground paprika.
9. Measure out 1/3 cup of curry powder.
10. Measure out 1/4 cup of ground dried limes.
11. Combine all the measured ingredients in a bowl.
12. Store the mixture in a tightly sealed jar.
